falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 swing low invalidates the 79% bottom pattern match, as that formation required higher lows; this would confirm continuation lower not bottoming

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Blowoff score of 39 suggests capitulation exhaustion; sustained VIX elevation above 35 indicates fear is accelerating not peaking, contradicting the bottoming signal and HOLD stance

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and stays there for 3+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained flight-to-quality bid in bonds with yields collapsing would signal recession panic rather than soft-landing bottom, invalidating the macro stabilization thesis implied by the pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
